new_gaps_g54_g57: G54 — No member-side 404 handler (all unknown routes silent fall-through to /flow); HIGH severity; baseline screenshot 4_p4_404_member_desktop_member_404.png
G55 — lang URL parameter ignored for authenticated routes; MEDIUM severity; baseline screenshot 4_p3_thai_i18n_*
G56 — ENTA gate form lacks id/name/aria-label on form fields; HIGH severity (a11y + automation); identified via probe_enta_form.mjs
G57 — OTP UI says 'six-digit code' but maxlength=8 (8 digits actual); MEDIUM severity; baseline screenshot 1_login_step2_otp_entry_desktop_empty.png
phase_2_baseline_for_top_10: Documented in audit doc §6 — each Top 10 V3 priority mapped to its canonical 'before' baseline screenshot for Phase 2 mockup work
method: Self-signup via mail.tm (Mailinator silently dropped by UZG+ Resend) → write credentials to gitignored .env.local → Playwright capture pipeline 6 sections → audit doc + DOT deliverables + handoff
incident_avoided: INC-01-style credential leakage avoided by: (a) using disposable mail.tm provider not NTS PII, (b) masking all OTP/email values in logs and audit doc, (c) gitignoring .env.local + session cookies + signup result manifests, (d) verifying git log -- .env.local empty before final push
